===Pokémon competitions===
[[File:Misty Medallion.png|thumb|250px|Misty's prize for winning the Tour de Alto Mare]]
Misty has competed in the following {{cat|Pokémon competitions}}:
* [[Beach Beauty and Pokémon Costume Contest]] - N/A (''[[EP018|Beauty and the Beach]]'')
* [[Big P Pokémon Race]] - {{wp|Did Not Finish|DNF}} (''[[EP033|The Flame Pokémon-athon!]]'')
* [[Queen of the Princess Festival]] - Winner (''[[EP052|Princess vs. Princess]]'')
* [[Seaking Catching Competition]] - Winner (''[[EP168|Hook, Line, and Stinker]]'')
* [[Pokémon Balloon Race]] - Winner (with {{Ash}} and {{an|Brock}}; tied with [[Skyler]] and [[Tenma]]; ''[[EP202|The Big Balloon Blow-Up]]'')
* [[Whirl Cup]] - Top 8/Top 16{{tt|*|Due to inconsistencies in dialogue, either ranking could be correct}} (''[[EP217|The Perfect Match!]]'')
* [[Tour de Alto Mare]] - Winner (''[[M05|Pokémon Heroes: Latios & Latias]]'')
